question: My course is not showing up in Canvas, what should I do?
final_answer:
Your course is not showing up in Canvas because it took up to 24 hours for new enrollments to appear. You can confirm your enrollment by checking the SIS (https://sis.jhu.edu). If you're having trouble, instructors can manually add students; contact them if the wait exceeds 48 hours.
Sources: it_canvas_access.md, policy_late_work.md, it_vpn_access.md, policy_extensions.md

assumptions: The retrieved context contains the necessary information
